records.ety: [L. abolitio, fr. abolere: cf. F. abolition. See Abolish.]

defs: The act of abolishing, or the state of being abolished; an annulling; abrogation; utter destruction; as, the abolition of slavery or the slave trade; the abolition of laws, decrees, ordinances, customs, taxes, debts, etc.
notes: ☞ The application of this word to persons is now unusual or obsolete
